// Simple API client — API URL can be overridden for remote monitoring deployments.
const DEFAULT_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001';function normalizeBaseUrl(url){return(url||'').trim().replace(/\/+$/,'');}export function getApiBaseUrl(){const override=typeof window!=='undefined'?window.localStorage.getItem('pharmapos_api_url'):'';return normalizeBaseUrl(override)||DEFAULT_BASE_URL;}export function setApiBaseUrl(url){const value=normalizeBaseUrl(url);if(typeof window==='undefined')return DEFAULT_BASE_URL;if(value)window.localStorage.setItem('pharmapos_api_url',value);else window.localStorage.removeItem('pharmapos_api_url');return getApiBaseUrl();}async function request(method,path){let body=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:null;const opts={method,headers:{}};if(body){opts.headers['Content-Type']='application/json';opts.body=JSON.stringify(body);}let res;try{res=await fetch(`${getApiBaseUrl()}${path}`,opts);}catch(err){throw new Error('Unable to reach the API. Check your network or API URL.');}let data=null;const contentType=res.headers.get('content-type')||'';if(contentType.includes('application/json')){data=await res.json();}else{const text=await res.text();data=text?{error:text}:{};}if(!res.ok)throw new Error(data.error||`Request failed: ${res.status}`);return data;}export const api={// Products
getProducts:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const qs=new URLSearchParams(params).toString();return request('GET',`/products${qs?'?'+qs:''}`);},getProduct:id=>request('GET',`/products/${id}`),createProduct:data=>request('POST','/products',data),updateProduct:(id,data)=>request('PUT',`/products/${id}`,data),deleteProduct:id=>request('DELETE',`/products/${id}`),getCategories:()=>request('GET','/products/categories/list'),// Batches
getBatches:productId=>request('GET',`/batches/${productId}`),createBatch:data=>request('POST','/batches',data),updateBatch:(id,data)=>request('PUT',`/batches/${id}`,data),deleteBatch:id=>request('DELETE',`/batches/${id}`),// Sales
createSale:data=>request('POST','/sales',data),getSales:function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const qs=new URLSearchParams(params).toString();return request('GET',`/sales${qs?'?'+qs:''}`);},getSale:id=>request('GET',`/sales/${id}`),getHealth:()=>request('GET','/health'),// Reports
getDailyReport:date=>request('GET',`/reports/daily${date?'?date='+date:''}`),getInventoryReport:()=>request('GET','/reports/inventory'),getExpiringReport:function(){let days=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:30;return request('GET',`/reports/expiring?days=${days}`);},// CSV exports (download link)
getCsvUrl:function(type){let params=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const qs=new URLSearchParams(params).toString();return`${getApiBaseUrl()}/reports/${type}/csv${qs?'?'+qs:''}`;}};
